title: solanum pentlandii subsp. interandinum
intro: Solanum pentlandii subsp. interandinum, also known as the Andean black nightshade, is a plant species in the Solanaceae family that belongs to the Solanum genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight against bacteria and viruses, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer activities. The health benefits of Solanum pentlandii subsp. interandinum include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce oxidative stress, and enhance immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
